home.heroDesc: Experience the magic of our premium, hand-selected fireworks. Safe, spectacular, and delivered directly via WhatsApp order.
home.featuredDesc: Hand-picked selections that guarantee a jaw-dropping finale for your celebration.

about.title: Our History
about.subtitle: Lighting up celebrations since 1995
about.p1: Cheng-BOOM started as a small family-owned shop with a passion for bringing joy to people's lives through spectacular light displays.
about.p2: Over the decades, we have grown into the premier supplier of high-quality consumer fireworks in the region. We travel the globe to source only the safest, most vibrant, and awe-inspiring pyrotechnics available.
about.p3: Our mission is simple: to make every celebration unforgettable. Whether it's a backyard wedding, a national holiday, or a New Year's Eve bash, we believe that the sky is the ultimate canvas.
about.premiumDesc: We test every product line to ensure maximum visual impact.
about.safetyDesc: All our fireworks meet strict national safety standards.
about.expertDesc: Our staff can help you design the perfect show for your budget.

footer.tagline: Malaysia's premier destination for quality fireworks. Light up your celebrations with our spectacular collection of premium pyrotechnics.
footer.orderNote: Orders fulfilled via WhatsApp · No online payment required

pw-1.name: Thunder Crackers 100x
pw-1.desc: Extremely loud crackling strings of mini firecrackers.

pw-2.name: Volcano Eruption Fountain
pw-2.desc: A 2-minute dazzling ground display of shimmering blue and gold sparks accompanied by a whistling finale.

pw-3.name: Magic Wand Sparklers
pw-3.desc: Long-lasting 20-inch sparklers emitting a stunning gold shower. Safe and perfect for parties or weddings.

pw-4.name: Ground Bloom Flower
pw-4.desc: Spins rapidly on the ground changing colors from green, red, and yellow.

pw-5.name: Super Snappers (Pop Pop)
pw-5.desc: Classic noise makers! Throw them on the ground for a loud snap.

pw-6.name: Dragon Pearl Crackle
pw-6.desc: Small pearls that emit loud cracking sounds and bright sparks when ignited.

pw-7.name: Grand Finale Cake 500g
pw-7.desc: The ultimate showstopper. 36 shots of gigantic brocade crowns with a rapid-fire crackling finish.

pw-8.name: Red Lantern Firecrackers
pw-8.desc: Traditional red firecrackers strung together for festive celebrations.

pw-9.name: Neon Sky Rockets
pw-9.desc: A 6-pack of powerful rockets that streak into the air with a neon tail before bursting into colorful peonies.
